title: Hearty Dutch Cornbread Bake
description: A warm and comforting Dutch-inspired cornbread bake perfect for a cozy evening. This moist and flavorful dish is a delightful twist on traditional cornbread.
instructions: Grease a 9x9-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, buttermilk, and honey.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
